spacing_and_layout.containers: Use p-8 or p-12 inside bordered cards to avoid collision
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use Bento Grid for Dashboard, Masonry layout for Press & Media 'Newsroom'

surface_strategies.navbars_and_donation_cards: Glassmorphism: High-diffusion backdrop-blur (backdrop-blur-2xl), bg-[#1A1A1A]/60, 1px delicate inner stroke (border-[#D4AF37]/20). MUST maintain text contrast.
surface_strategies.founder_photos: Identity Lock CSS Filter: `contrast-110 saturate-[0.85] sepia-[0.1]`. NO AI BEAUTIFICATION OR DISTORTION. 100% human authenticity.

motion_and_interactions.scroll_effects: GSAP ScrollTrigger for 'Impact Stats' count-up and staggered section reveals.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must shift from a lighter gold hue on hover, subtle lift (-translate-y-1).
motion_and_interactions.press_media: Lightbox Zoom for clipping readability. Infinity-scrolling logo strip (Marquee) for Authority Ticker.

image_urls.description: Wide-angle cinematic photograph of an Indian village scene at golden hour, deep charcoal shadows, muted gold sunlight, 90s retro film aesthetic
Abstract dark charcoal background with soft muted gold glowing light leaks, 90s retro cinematic film grain texture
Elderly Indian woman smiling broadly, representing Vayorang Elderly Care
Elderly Indian woman smiling, representing elderly care impact

technical_requirements.frontend: Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/UI (heavily customized for modern luxury aesthetic), GSAP
technical_requirements.backend: Node.js, MongoDB Atlas, Razorpay SDK, Google Gemini 1.5 Flash API, Cloudinary
technical_requirements.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="donate-button"`)
technical_requirements.accessibility: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text. Use Text Shadow over images.
technical_requirements.icons: Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react for modern luxury duotone feel.

modules.name: Global Payment Toggle (Admin)
modules.description: Toggle between Mode A (Manual QR with form upload) and Mode B (Razorpay Standard Checkout). Ensure 'Indian Donors Only (INR)' disclaimer is visible.

modules.name: AI 'Chief of Staff' (Admin)
modules.description: Upload PDF/News -> Gemini OCR extracts Location/Patient Count/Date -> Generates 2-3 sentence 'Success Story'. Saves images to Cloudinary.

modules.name: Press & Media 'Newsroom'
modules.description: Masonry Grid with Lightbox Zoom. Infinity-scrolling logo strip for Authority Ticker. Filters: 'District' or 'Year'.

modules.name: Legal & Compliance Vault (Admin) / Transparency Page (Public)
modules.description: Secure vault for Society Reg, PAN, 12A/80G, Board Resolution. Public transparency page for Governance documents.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme, using #1A1A1A, #D4AF37, and #F5F5F7.
Implement high-diffusion glassmorphism strictly on Navbars and Donation Cards.
DO NOT alter the facial features or geometry of the founder photos. Use the specified CSS identity lock filter (`contrast-110 saturate-[0.85] sepia-[0.1]`) ONLY.
Ensure GSAP ScrollTrigger is properly integrated for impact stats.
For the Press & Media Newsroom, use a masonry layout with a lightbox zoom component for full readability.
All components MUST have a `data-testid` attribute for automated testing.
